name: Sausage Ragu with Cream Base
description: A rich and hearty sausage ragu made with Italian sausages, vegetables, tomatoes and herbs, finished with heavy cream for a luxurious sauce that pairs perfectly with rigatoni pasta.
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
Freshly grated Parmesan cheese for serving
method: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil and let it heat.
Remove sausage casings and add sausage meat to the pan, breaking it up with a wooden spoon. Cook until browned and cooked through, about 8-10 minutes.
Add diced onion, carrots, and celery to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are softened and lightly golden, about 10-15 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in white wine and let it simmer for 2-3 minutes to cook off the alcohol.
Add crushed tomatoes, bay leaves, rosemary, thyme, and sage. Season with salt and pepper.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer gently for 45 minutes to 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
About 30 minutes before sauce is done, bring a large pot of salted water to boil. Cook rigatoni according to package directions until al dente. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water before draining.
Remove herb sprigs and bay leaves from the sauce. Stir in heavy cream and simmer for 2-3 minutes until well combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
Add drained pasta to the sauce and toss to coat. Add reserved pasta water if needed to loosen the sauce.
Serve immediately garnished with freshly grated Parmesan cheese and chopped parsley.
